stocks.impact_theory: OpenAI reported missing key sales and user targets, raising doubts about AI hype sustainability. Economic implications include potential slowdown in GPU demand; market psychology shows fear of bubble burst, similar to dot-com era when tech leaders faltered on growth misses. Analogies: 1) Like Cisco in 2000, infrastructure king hit by demand reality. 2) Oil rig boom-bust cycles where capex surges then stalls.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: WSJ report on OpenAI shortfalls triggered 3.5%+ premarket drop; X sentiment negative with panic selling mentions. Web news confirms AI complex under pressure.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dip for 5-10% rebound if support holds at $190; historical pullbacks recover fast.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 10%+ downside targeting $175; high volume selling.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Unexpected AI demand surge or buyback announcement could reverse; broader market rally.

stocks.justification: Strong consensus across news and X on OpenAI impact; clear sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 earnings beat with EPS 29x expectations, data center +22% YoY; implies turnaround in AI/server chips. Psychology: Relief rally after turnaround narrative. Parallels: AMD's 2016 recovery. Analogies: 1) Like Ford post-2008 restructuring. 2) Caterpillar commodity rebound.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings surge, Barclays PT raise; X posts highlight gap up and momentum.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 15% upside to $100; momentum intact.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or small short if RSI overbought fades.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Short interest piling back; execution risks in turnaround.

stocks.justification: Solid earnings but high valuation and short data add caution.

stocks.impact_theory: Collateral damage from OpenAI miss despite limited direct exposure; sector rotation out of AI hyperscalers. Implications: Profit-taking after 90% monthly run. Parallels: 2022 chip selloff. Analogies: 1) Boeing supply chain fears. 2) Tesla post-hype correction.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Down 6% on OpenAI news per X/web; panic in AI trade.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Dip buy at $140 support for 8% bounce.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Differentiated from NVDA; strong underlying demand.

stocks.justification: Sentiment tied to sector, but less direct hit than NVDA.

stocks.impact_theory: $300B OpenAI cloud deal at risk from missed targets; CFO spending concerns. Implications: Capacity reallocation needed. Psychology: Fear of customer concentration. Parallels: MSFT Azure growth scares. Analogies: 1) AWS dependency on Amazon. 2) Pipeline burst in energy infrastructure.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Down 7% premarket; WSJ report highlights compute commitments.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy if demand shifts to others; 10% upside.

stocks.justification: Direct exposure but CEO comments mitigate.

stocks.impact_theory: Q1 beat on rev/EPS, AI/solar demand; Q2 guide slightly light. Implications: Steady growth in optics for AI data centers. Psychology: Relief on beat amid tech selloff. Parallels: 2021 supply chain winners. Analogies: 1) Fiber optic boom like 5G. 2) Glass for EV batteries.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Beat estimates; X mixed but positive on numbers despite guide.

stocks.justification: Solid but guide miss tempers enthusiasm.
